reason: This role frequently requires fast-paced decision-making and deductive logic, such as rapidly troubleshooting anesthesia machine leak tests by isolating variables under time pressure. Additionally, it demands mathematical proficiency for vital tasks like applying physics formulas to calculate oxygen tank flow rates to prevent patient hypoxia. While strict protocols exist for decontamination and setup, the intense requirement for real-time problem-solving and quantitative reasoning makes this an analytical position.
